messages.text: A serpent's venom courses through your veins, burning hotter with every heartbeat.
{name} shudders as a serpent's venom courses through their veins.
The serpent venom burns deeper through your veins.
The last of the serpent venom burns itself out of your blood.
The serpent venom afflicting {name} finally burns itself out.
{name} is racked by a serpent's venom coursing through their veins.
